question: Which team will win the 2026 NBA Championship (Finals, June 2026)?
leakage_control: Evidence is the state of the 2025-26 season AS OF mid-January 2026, reconstructed from knowledge at/before the model's Jan-2026 training cutoff. The Finals outcome (June 2026) is AFTER the cutoff and is NOT known to the model — so it cannot be recalled, and no live search for the result was performed. This is a genuine as-of forecast.
note: As-of standings/roster reads are approximate recollections dated to the cutoff, not exact box scores.

snippets.read: Defending 2025 champions; returned core (SGA reigning MVP, Holmgren, J. Williams); leading or near the top of the West. Clear preseason and mid-season title favorite.
Top of the East; Mitchell + Mobley (2025 DPOY). Strong regular-season team, playoff questions.
Jokic (perennial MVP-tier); reloaded bench. Always a title threat while healthy.
Added Kevin Durant (summer 2025) to a young, deep, defensive core. Rising West contender.
Luka Doncic (acquired Feb 2025) + LeBron. High-ceiling but defense/health questions.
Brunson + Towns; reached 2025 Eastern Conference Finals. Solid East contender.
Anthony Edwards ascending; two straight deep playoff runs.
OUT of contention: Jayson Tatum ruptured his Achilles in the 2025 playoffs (likely misses most/all of 2025-26); roster thinned (Porzingis, Holiday traded for financial reasons).
OUT of contention: Tyrese Haliburton tore his Achilles in Game 7 of the 2025 Finals; out for 2025-26.
